story: After the fire, Jules and Cam sit on a rooftop at sunrise. Jules admits she hates being seen as a hero and asks Cam to keep that secret. He promises. Later, alone in the stairwell, Cam thinks about how they once dreamed of mattering together, how he sometimes envies her public role and wanted the glory himself.
implausible_knowledge: Cam thinks about how they once dreamed of mattering together, how he sometimes envies her public role and wanted the glory himself.
question: A week later, what will Jules most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: She will keep her feelings to herself and avoid leaning on Cam.
answer_without_knowledge: She will confide in Cam again and rely on him for support.
